meaning: n.汽车等的仪表板,马车等前部的挡泥板
examples: He twiddled a knob on the dashboard.
The clock on the dashboard said it was five to two.
The front window switches are awkwardly placed on the dashboard.
Her father, who wasn't wearing a seat belt, ricocheted off Gisela and into the dashboard.
His fingers are no longer tapping on the dashboard but draped around his pointed knees.
